name: Eve
oracleText:
Whenever another nontoken creature enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
flavorText: "And Adam called his wife's name Eve; because she was the mother of all living." — Genesis 3:20
notes: Early World major figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for The Creation of Eve.
title: Mother of the Living
